title: mentha × villosa var. lycopifolia
intro: Mentha × villosa var. lycopifolia, also known as pineapple mint or variegated mint, is a unique and lesser-known variety of the mint plant that is characterized by its leaves, which have distinctive white and green striped patterns. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating skin irritations and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. lycopifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. Mentha × villosa var. lycopifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
